stemHtml: Approaching UUDY, you ask for the latest RVR. METAR shows: R14/1400U. What does ATC report?

options.a: RVR runway one four 1400 metres upward tendency.
options.b: RVR runway one four 1400 metres unchanged.
options.c: RVR runway one four 1400 metres downward tendency.
options.d: RVR runway one four 1400 metres will rise in 2 hours.
